name: @builtwithjavascript/file-input-validator
description: A generic file input validator that can be used in other frameworks like React, Vue, Svelte etc.
author: Damiano Fusco
keywords: component, file, file input, libraries, scripts, javascript, large scale apps, vue, react, svelte, nuxt, next, node

scripts.build: npm run pretty && tsc --esModuleInterop && vite build && npm run build-types
scripts.pub: npm run build; npm publish --access public --otp=
scripts.version-patch: npm run pretty && npm version patch -m "Patch version"
scripts.push: npm run pretty; git add .; git commit -m "Latest"; git push
